transaction.comments: Hill back in and he loves Scheffler.

I think Starks will take Grants job in GB at some point next season if he can stay healthy.  Felix is in a terrible situation with a terrible organization.  I need something in return that I can build my team of the future with.  If I trade away these 2 guys I'm basically calling my season over since they're my 2 highest scoring players I have rostered.  I've got to get something in return that makes that worth while.  Your a contender right now and these guys could push you to a title making your 1st round pick of lower value to boot since there's so many teams in the league.
There are a couple guys I'd like but I just have too many prospects already to deal with.

I included Peerman & Coffman only because I want to clear cap space. While cutting them would cost me less than half a mill, I am that tight against the cap whereas you have the cap space to cut them (or keep them if you see any value there). JMac
